ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data collection */,
  "postmile_abs" REAL /* Absolute postmile location */,
  "postmile_ca" TEXT /* California-specific postmile location */,
  "vds_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Vehicle Detection Station (VDS) */,
  "agg_flow" INTEGER /* Aggregated flow of vehicles */,
  "lane_points" INTEGER /* Number of lane points */,
  "observed_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of observed data */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles */,
  "occupancy" REAL /* Percentage of time the lane is occupied by vehicles */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of traffic flow */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather conditions during data collection */,
  "incident_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if there was a traffic incident during the data collection */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_vds_id FOREIGN KEY ("vds_id") REFERENCES vds ("vds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_time FOREIGN KEY ("time") REFERENCES time_intervals ("start_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "vds" (
  "vds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VDS */,
  "vds_name" TEXT /* Name of the VDS */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the VDS is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the VDS was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the VDS */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the VDS */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the VDS */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Current software version of the VDS */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the VDS location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the VDS location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vds_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time interval */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the interval */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the interval */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interval */,
  "interval_length" INTEGER /* Length of the interval in minutes */,
  "interval_type" TEXT /* Type of interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lanes" (
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lane */,
  "vds_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VDS where the lane is located */,
  "lane_number" INTEGER /* Lane number */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the lane */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the lane */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the lane */,
  "surface_material" TEXT /* Material of the lane surface */,
  "lane_type" TEXT /* Type of lane */,
  "lane_capacity" INTEGER /* Estimated capacity of the lane in vehicles per hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lanes_vds_id FOREIGN KEY ("vds_id") REFERENCES vds ("vds_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the flow category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flow category */,
  "threshold_min" INTEGER /* Minimum threshold for the flow category */,
  "threshold_max" INTEGER /* Maximum threshold for the flow category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "period_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the observation period in days */,
  "period_status" TEXT /* Status of the observation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify file integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic incident */,
  "vds_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VDS where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the incident */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the incident */,
  "caused_by" TEXT /* Cause of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incidents_vds_id FOREIGN KEY ("vds_id") REFERENCES vds ("vds_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "vds_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VDS the report is based on */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the report period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the report period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_reports_vds_id FOREIGN KEY ("vds_id") REFERENCES vds ("vds_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vds_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VDS that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  "maintenance_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the maintenance */,
  "next_action" TEXT /* Next action required after maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vds_id FOREIGN KEY ("vds_id") REFERENCES vds ("vds_id")
)
